mapper.sql: id, user_id, name, gender, birthday, phone, id_card, relation, is_default, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from t_family_member order by id desc
mapper.update: update t_family_member set user_id = #{et.userId}, name = #{et.name}, gender = #{et.gender}, birthday = #{et.birthday}, phone = #{et.phone}, id_card = #{et.idCard}, relation = #{et.relation}, is_default = #{et.isDefault}, create_time = #{et.createTime}, update_time = #{et.updateTime} where id = #{et.id}
